title: stipa kurdistanica
intro: Stipa kurdistanica, also known as Kurdish wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Middle East. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stipa kurdistanica are said to include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
